title: Huskot
description: A work-in-progress mod that adds many creatures, a tamable mod called huskot, a neutral mob called snappalm, a new villager profession and a giant reptile called cocolossus.
body: This is a mod that adds a creature called huskot, they will become tamed if right clicked by someone holding a coconut. To obtain the coconut you must trade with a biologist villager, to make a villager a biologist you must place a soul lantern on the ground near it. Huskots are very clingy, so they wont ever stop following their owner. This mod also adds the close relatives of huskot known as snapalm and cocolossus, snapalms are  long-necked reptiles that have a powerful bite force for they're size. Cocolossus is a large reptile that is usually gentle but if provoked will fight back with a powerful bite. snapalms when slain drop they're meat. if a huskot is slain it will drop its cute little hat.
